0x2310.recovery: Check wiring, reduce load, verify motor parameters

0x2320.recovery: Check motor wiring for short circuits

0x3110.recovery: Check supply voltage, add braking resistor if needed

0x3120.recovery: Reduce deceleration ramp, add braking resistor

0x3210.recovery: Check supply voltage, verify power supply capacity

0x4210.recovery: Improve ventilation, reduce duty cycle, check ambient temp

0x4310.recovery: Check motor thermal protection, reduce load

0x5280.recovery: Reset safety input (STO), check emergency stop chain

0x5441.recovery: Configure motor parameters for sensorless operation

0x6010.recovery: Power cycle, update firmware if persistent

0x7121.recovery: Check mechanics, reduce load, verify current limits

0x7500.recovery: Check EtherCAT cabling, verify cycle time settings

0x7510.recovery: Reduce CAN bus load, check baud rate

0x8100.recovery: Check CAN wiring and termination resistors

0x8200.recovery: Check EtherCAT topology, verify master settings

0x8210.message: PDO not processed due to length error
0x8210.recovery: Verify PDO mapping matches device configuration

0x8611.recovery: Tune position controller, reduce velocity, check mechanics

0x8612.recovery: Check software limits, verify homing was successful

0xFF01.recovery: Jog in negative direction, check limit switch

0xFF02.recovery: Jog in positive direction, check limit switch

4357.message: MC error — axis not referenced (not homed)

4358.message: MC error — axis in error state
4358.recovery: Call MC_Reset_Festo, then re-enable with MC_Power_Festo

4361.recovery: Check position target is within SW limits

4365.message: MC error — command not allowed in current state
4365.recovery: Check CiA 402 state machine, ensure axis is Operation Enabled

3501.recovery: Install missing library via Library Manager

3700.recovery: Optimize code, reduce cycle time, check WHILE loops
